task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Fixed Assets' module has been enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Fixed Assets' visible in the left-hand navigation menu of the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the fixed asset name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Bosch CDR 900 Diagnostic System' in the 'Name' or 'Item' field of the fixed asset form, or in the Fixed Assets list view.

task_completion.description: Verify the acquisition date and cost are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the date '2024-07-15' in the acquisition date field and '8500' (or '8,500') in the acquisition cost field.

task_completion.description: Verify the depreciation method and useful life are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Straight-line' (or 'StraightLine') selected in the depreciation method dropdown/field, and '60' entered in the useful life (months) field.

task_completion.description: Verify the salvage/residual value is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '500' entered in the salvage value or residual value field on the fixed asset form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating to Manager.io (http://localhost:8080), not a terminal executing API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Manager.io forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Manager.io graphical user interface with form fields being filled out, rather than a text editor or a static HTML mock.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show direct SQLite database insertions or curl commands used to create the fixed asset.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Fixed Asset Name: 'Bosch CDR 900 Diagnostic System'. Acquisition Date: '2024-07-15'. Acquisition Cost: 8500. Depreciation Method: 'Straight-line' (or 'StraightLine'). Useful Life: 60 months. Salvage Value: 500. Application URL: http://localhost:8080.
